group.kickSuccess: 🚫 @{user} has been removed from the group.
group.addSuccess: ✅ @{user} has been added to the group.
group.addPrivacy: ⚠️ @{user} has privacy settings. Invite link sent to DM.
group.terminateWarn:
⚠️ *WARNING* ⚠️

💀 *Group will be terminated now...*

_All members will be removed._
group.pendingFooter:
_Use .accept <number> or .acceptall to approve_
_Use .reject <number> or .rejectall to decline_
group.eventsOn: ✅ Group events are now *ON* for this group.
group.eventsOff: ❌ Group events are now *OFF* for this group.
group.welcomeOn: ✅ Welcome messages are now *ON* for this group.
group.welcomeOff: ❌ Welcome messages are now *OFF* for this group.
group.goodbyeOn: ✅ Goodbye messages are now *ON* for this group.
group.goodbyeOff: ❌ Goodbye messages are now *OFF* for this group.
group.adminOnly: ⚠️ Only group admins can use this command!
group.antiLinkOn: 🛡️ Anti-link is now *ON* for this group.
group.antiLinkOff: ✅ Anti-link is now *OFF* for this group.
group.antiBadOn: 🛡️ Anti-bad-words is now *ON* for this group.
group.antiBadOff: ✅ Anti-bad-words is now *OFF* for this group.
group.cannotIdentifyUser:
❌ Could not identify user. Please provide their number.
Ex: {example}
group.addVerifyFail: ⚠️ Could not verify {number}. Please try again.
group.newgroupProvide:
❌ Please provide a group name.
Ex: .newgroup My Group
group.hidetag_provide:
❌ Please provide a message.
Ex: {example}hidetag Your message
group.everyone_adminOnly: ⚠️ @{user} Only group admins can use this command!
group.antiPromoteOn: ✅ Anti-Promote is now *ON* for this group.
group.antiPromoteOff: ✅ Anti-Promote is now *OFF* for this group.
group.antiDemoteOn: ✅ Anti-Demote is now *ON* for this group.
group.antiDemoteOff: ✅ Anti-Demote is now *OFF* for this group.
group.antiGcMention_status:
🛡️ *Anti-Group-Mention*

Current: *{status}*

Usage:
• {prefix}antigroupmention on
• {prefix}antigroupmention warn
• {prefix}antigroupmention delete
• {prefix}antigroupmention kick
• {prefix}antigroupmention off
group.antiGcMentionInvalid: ❌ Invalid option. Use: on, warn, delete, kick, off
group.join_invalidLink:
❌ Please provide a valid invite link.
Ex: .join https://chat.whatsapp.com/...

owner.sudoNotFound: ⚠️ @{user} is not in the sudo list.

⚠️ Note: Auto like only works when auto view (*autoreadstatus*) is also *ON*
